label: USDA FoodData Central (SR Legacy)
description:
~8,800 foods with full nutrient profiles from the USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy dataset. Includes natural foods, processed foods, and prepared dishes. Each atom carries key nutrients per 100g (energy, protein, fat, carbohydrates, fiber, vitamins, minerals).

Atom IDs: food:{category}:{name}, e.g. food:fruit:apple_raw_with_skin
attribution: USDA FoodData Central, Agricultural Research Service
